overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character exploring a desert waterfront settlement. The character walks along weathered wooden docks, passes adobe buildings, traverses arid terrain with cacti and wooden structures, and explores a small settlement with horses before reaching an overlook with a distant boat visible on the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: weathered wooden fishing dock extending over calm water

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along wooden dock planks toward boats moored in the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway with visible gaps and grain
large wooden sailing vessel with mast moored in the water
rough wooden fence railing along the dock edge
wooden barrel sitting on the dock planks
wooden structure holding multiple fishing rods

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden fishing dock extending over calm water. A large wooden boat is moored ahead, while fishing gear and barrels line the walkway. The bright midday sun casts sharp shadows on the weathered planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront adobe building with wooden walkway

events.description: transitions from wooden dock to dirt ground alongside adobe building

agents.ego_description: character walking along the dock then transitioning onto dirt path beside a white adobe building

entered.detail: white plastered adobe building with dark wooden roof beams and arched windows
heavy wooden plank door on the adobe building
cluster of buildings visible across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the dock as an adobe building rises on the left, partially obscuring the sky. The wooden dock transitions to dirt ground as the character moves past the building's wooden door, with a distant settlement visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert settlement with wooden pergolas and cacti

agents.ego_description: character traversing open desert terrain with scattered cacti and wooden structures

group of prickly pear cacti growing on the desert ground
small dilapidated wooden structure with slanted roof
rough wooden post fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves into open desert terrain, leaving the waterfront behind. Wooden pergolas and scattered cacti dot the landscape, with a small wooden shack visible in the distance. A horse stands near a fence to the left as the character walks along the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert village settlement with horses overlooking water

events.description: character slows and stops at overlook point with view of distant boat on water

agents.ego_description: character exploring the settlement area and stopping at an overlook to view the water

notable_agents.action: horse tied near the adobe cabin entrance

entered.detail: small adobe house with wooden roof and porch
wooden wagon cart with railings parked near the building
sailing vessel visible on the water in the far distance
calm water surface reflecting the sky

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a small desert settlement with adobe cabins and horses. After passing a wooden cart and a horse tied near a building, the character stops at an overlook point. A distant boat is visible on the water below, with mountains framing the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow waterfront dock into the heart of a sun-drenched desert settlement. It begins with the character walking along weathered wooden planks past fishing gear and barrels toward a moored boat under a bright midday sun. As the character moves forward, the dock transitions into dirt ground beside a towering adobe building, shifting the perspective from the water toward a distant shoreline. The scene then opens into an arid landscape of scattered cacti and wooden pergolas, passing a fenced horse and a lonely shack along a dusty path. Finally, the camera leads the character through a small cluster of adobe cabins and wooden carts before stopping at an overlook that reveals a distant boat and mountains framing the horizon.
